title: All eyes are on John Healey, the UK's new finance minister. Here’s what’s at stake
summary_full: J.P. Morgan boss Jamie Dimon, who backed Healey's predecessor, has waded into the U.K.'s political debate.
summary_public: J.P. Morgan boss Jamie Dimon, who backed Healey's predecessor, has waded into the U.K.'s political debate.
